direct_action: The signal is clear enough to respond normally instead of guessing.

single_low_signal: One tiny social signal is not enough to carry a full theory.

vague_language: Vague wording is not the same as clear intent.

social_media_overread: Social media activity is easy to overvalue, so keep this grounded.

consistent_effort: Consistency is one of the strongest signals in the app, and that helps this case.
Repeated effort carries more weight than one exciting moment.
Consistency makes this easier to treat as real.
delayed_reply: A delayed reply by itself does not justify a big emotional reading.
Slow replies weaken the case unless stronger signals offset them.
Timing matters, and delay usually lowers confidence.
